title: Melted Kenyan Tilapia Wrap
description: A midnight craving Kenyan wrap that melts buttered tilapia into a tender, savory filling wrapped in a fresh ti leaf.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add coconut oil until melted.
Sprinkle tilapia fillets with ground ginger, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, rubbing the spices into the flesh.
Place the seasoned fillets in the hot skillet and sear for 3 minutes on each side until a golden crust forms and the fish flakes easily.
Squeeze lime juice over the cooked fish and cook for an additional minute to infuse citrus flavor.
Transfer the cooked fish to a cutting board and break it into bite‑sized shards with a fork.
Warm ti leaf wraps in a dry pan for 15 seconds on each side to make them pliable.
Spread a generous amount of shredded tilapia onto the center of each ti leaf wrap.
Sprinkle chopped coriander over the fish filling for a fresh herbal note.
Fold the sides of the wrap inward and roll tightly to enclose the filling, tucking the ends to secure.
Serve the wraps immediately, optionally with a side of sliced avocado or a light yogurt dipping sauce.
